rule_metadata.name: AV_Evasion_Tool
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'AV_Evasion_Tool' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule AV_Evasion_Tool
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'AV_Evasion_Tool' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "AV_Evasion_Tool"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"
